headline: US Home Prices Were Nearly Flat in February as Large Markets Split Evenly Between Gains and Declines
summary: ARLINGTON, Va., March 12, 2026--Homes.com, a CoStar Group (NASDAQ: CSGP) leading online residential marketplace, released a new report today analyzing home price trends through February 2026, including details across major metros and house types.

headline: CoStar Group Stock: Is CSGP Underperforming the Real Estate Sector?
summary: CoStar Group has outperformed the real estate sector over the past year, and analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s outlook.
